summary: Bun install duplicated in workflow (lines 18-20, 44-46)—should be composite action. Missing actionlint validation step (task requirement: 'Run actionlint...and fix any errors'). Scripts have solid type safety, validation, and error handling. cleanup.ts is pure/testable logic. Workflow lacks act-result.txt generation and explicit test fixture integration; missing validation that actionlint passes and unit tests pass. Core cleanup logic sound, but CI/CD integration incomplete.
